CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-01-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of A Minor
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Appearances:
Robert E. Hayden, Esq. for Petitioner: May Melby present as guardian ad litem for Anthony Duchene, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants the compromise as follows:
Compromise: $14,00.00
Attorney's fees: $3,500.00.
A net balance of $10,500.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank Of America, Richmond Branch, 5500 Geary Blvd., San Francisco, CA. 94121
until minor's reaches the age of 18.
Order signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise In Scd
